name: Ubiquiti Device Bridge Pro
title: Ubiquiti Device Bridge Pro
short_description: 5 GHz wireless bridge. Note: This device includes a +11 memory surcharge due to ongoing volatility in global memory and storage markets, applied by Ubiquiti effective April 24, 2026.
description: The Ubiquiti Device Bridge Pro (UDB-Pro) is a high-performance 5 GHz wireless bridge designed to extend network coverage over distances exceeding 5 kilometers. This device excels in point-to-point connectivity, enabling a stable and fast wireless link to another UDB-Pro or a seamless uplink to UniFi networks via the Auto-Link feature. With support for Wi-Fi standards 802.11a/n/ac and a 2x2 MIMO configuration, the UDB-Pro achieves a maximum data rate of 867 Mbps, making it ideal for high-bandwidth applications. Its powerful internal antenna with a gain of 19 dBi ensures reliable and secure connections over long distances, even in challenging outdoor conditions. This feature-rich solution is ideal for professionals seeking a dependable and easily managed long-range wireless bridge.

detailed_description.heading: Robust Performance
detailed_description.text: The Ubiquiti Device Bridge Pro (UDB-Pro) is a high-performance 5 GHz wireless bridge designed to extend network coverage over distances exceeding 5 kilometers. This device excels in point-to-point connectivity, enabling a stable and fast wireless link to another UDB-Pro or a seamless uplink to UniFi networks via the Auto-Link feature. With support for Wi-Fi standards 802.11a/n/ac and a 2x2 MIMO configuration, the UDB-Pro achieves a maximum data rate of 867 Mbps, making it ideal for high-bandwidth applications. Its powerful internal antenna with a gain of 19 dBi ensures reliable and secure connections over long distances, even in challenging outdoor conditions. This feature-rich solution is ideal for professionals seeking a dependable and easily managed long-range wireless bridge.
Note that the UDB-Pro cannot function as a standalone device; it must be part of a managed UniFi network, offering scalability and streamlined management for large-scale deployments.

detailed_description.heading: Enhanced Connectivity
detailed_description.text: Equipped with two Gigabit Ethernet (GbE) ports, the UDB-Pro offers flexible networking options and Passive PoE output, allowing users to power additional devices such as security cameras or access points without the need for extra cabling. Powered via PoE or PoE+ (a compatible adapter is included), the UDB-Pro supports PoE passthrough when powered with a PoE+ input, enhancing its utility in versatile networking environments. The included PoE+ adapter or a compatible UniFi PoE switch ensures consistent power delivery, making this device perfect for remote installations where reliable power is essential. To ensure seamless integration with UniFi systems, the UDB-Pro is managed through a UniFi Console, Official UniFi Hosting, or a self-hosted UniFi Network Server. This allows remote monitoring, firmware updates, and configuration adjustments through the UniFi platform.

detailed_description.heading: Built for Durability
detailed_description.text: The Ubiquiti Device Bridge Pro is built with a rugged design and advanced weatherproofing to handle outdoor environments where stability and durability are critical. Its IPX6-rated enclosure shields the device from heavy rain, dust, and fluctuating temperatures, ensuring uninterrupted operation even in harsh weather. With pole-mounting capability, the UDB-Pro can be installed at elevated points, optimizing signal reach and maintaining a clear line of sight for superior transmission. This robust construction makes the UDB-Pro suitable for challenging environments where consistent connectivity is required, from industrial sites to rural areas needing reliable network access.
